title: Stadium Shinies [Cobblemon]
description: Changes the shiny forms of the first *251 Pokémon to match their shinies from Pokémon Stadium 2. (ONLY JOHTO POKEMON SO FAR)
body:
***Currently only the 96 Johto Pokémon included in vanilla Cobblemon are in the pack. Kanto's 151 will be added at a later point**
> The Mega Form texture sheets are from **Cobblemon: Mega Showdown and Navas' ZA Megas respective artists**.

Big thanks to the [Blue Moon Falls](https://bluemoonfalls.com/pages/general/stadium-gif-archive) for their Stadium 2 Gif Archive! Without these I wouldn't have been able to get model-accurate colors. PLEASE check out the rest of their site; they have very useful tools for the generation 2 games as well as informational resources explaining mechanics from those games.

![too green](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e716e916d57cd6ad519feb02ad885fa4cee5d76a.png)

![green](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1e554a858bac13c55a6790327758d54344bf396.gif)

Disclaimer: Three of the currently available 96 shinies are not completely accurate to their Stadium 2 counterparts. 

    Gligar's shiny was identical to it's modern base colors, I've instead swapped for it's base colors.
    Unown did not have a shiny in Stadium 2. I left it as is.
    Magcargo's shell is not orange in Stadium 2. There was some weird emissive textures that I did not know how to replicate, so I only changed the body to purple.
